title: Fire's Tool WorkShop
description:
This mod has been discontinued
This is a tools mod that has been created with the help of the MCreator app
https://mcreator.net
See description for more
body:
Just so every one knows I have stoped updating this small mod to work on a "sequel". If you want to play it, its been published on modrinth [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/reflamed) If you have any suggestons on the mod you can leave them [here](https://cbduzebj7a9.typeform.com/to/Z5lPApLV) Glad you had fun!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This tools mod is made with the help of the **MCreator** app.
[https://mcreator.net](https://mcreator.net)
This mod currently adds 3 new sets of tools. Paper, Lemon, and Titanium. They only have the Sword, Pickaxe, and Axe as of right now. Paper being the weakest, Lemon is in the middle ground, Titanium is the strongest, and 2 types of hammers. Although I'm planing on adding more things, I can not promise a consistent update schedule. I suggest using JEI for first time players.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
